# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: AI-assisted problem solving in CodeGrind
- Summary: Showcase how CodeGrind's AI assistant helps learners tackle DS&A challenges in real-time with guided hints and model switching.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assisted-problem-solving
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assisted-problem-solving

- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind combines LeetCode-style problems with Azure OpenAI-powered guidance, giving learners dynamic problem-solving help, multiple model options, and an integrated editor to practice and learn faster.
- CTA: Try a new AI-assisted problem now and compare how different models influence your approach.
- Visual brief: A short screen-recorded flow: user opens a DS&A problem in CodeGrind, AI assistant panel appears with model toggle (GPT-4o/GPT-3.5), hints unfold step-by-step, code editor updates in real-time, ending with a quick summary of solution approach and a prompt to try another model.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
